content: Adding credits will automatically enable {{organizationName}} AI and make models available to all users. Continue?

comment.text: This key displays a confirmation message within a dialog, prompting the user to add credits to enable AI features for their organization. The message explains that adding credits will unlock {{organizationName}} AI and make models accessible to all users. It appears as the body text in a confirmation dialog.
